title: Roasted Greek Beet Casserole
description: A fresh, juicy weeknight Greek dish featuring roasted beets, feta, Greek yogurt, dill, lemon, olives, and a crispy breadcrumb crust, satvik-friendly and perfect for dinner.
instructions: Place peeled beets on a baking sheet, drizzle with 1 tablespoon olive oil, season with salt, and roast for 45 minutes until tender.
While beets roast, whisk together feta, Greek yogurt, dill, lemon juice, and remaining olive oil in a bowl until well combined.
When beets are done, remove them, let cool slightly, then slice into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
In a casserole dish, layer half of the beet slices, then spread half of the feta mixture evenly over them.
Sprinkle a layer of panko breadcrumbs and sliced olives over the mixture.
Add the remaining beet slices on top, then pour the rest of the feta mixture and sprinkle remaining breadcrumbs.
Bake the assembled casserole for an additional 15 minutes until the top is golden brown.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes, slice, and serve warm with a drizzle of lemon zest.
